'''Shobquix Yards''' produced the [[Toscan 8-Q starfighter]], one of the precursors to [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr's]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing starfighter]]. The fighter was so notable that the company was sometimes referred to as the '''Toscan''' corporation.

{{Company-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]'' names the makers of the "[[Toscan 8-Q starfighter|Tocsan Q-8]]" as '''"Tocsan"''' corporation. The fighter's name was, however, changed in later sources to "Toscan", probably owing to a typo.
